name: Chicken Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place skinned and boned chicken breasts in a sauté pan. Sprinkle with white pepper.
2. Add chicken stock and white wine; bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat.
3. Simmer covered for 25 minutes. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon and reserve broth. Cover the reserved chicken and keep it warm.
4. Clean spinach and remove stems. Spin dry, then steam for 3 minutes and drain again. Reserve.
5. Combine water and cornstarch in a small bowl. Stir into the hot broth in the pan until smooth. Cook, stirring, until thickened and bubbly, about 2 more minutes.
6. Add Neufchatel cheese and stir until melted.
7. Arrange reserved spinach on plates; sprinkle with lemon juice. Top each serving with reserved chicken, then sauce. Sprinkle with paprika and garnish with lemon slices or wedges.
